title: AN ACT RENAMING THE GUREL-BOKOD-KABAYAN-ABATAN ROAD IN THE PROVINCE OF BENGUET TO CONG, ANDRES ACOP COSALAN ROAD

chunks.text:
114 OG No. 36, 6349 (September 3, 2018)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11061, August 17, 2018 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE GUREL-BOKOD-KABAYAN-ABATAN ROAD IN THE PROVINCE OF BENGUET TO CONG, ANDRES ACOP COSALAN ROAD

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. In recognition of his public service rendered to the people of the Province of Benguet from the Sixth to Seventh Congress and the Interim Batasang Pambansa, the Gurel-Bokod-Kabayan-Abatan Road is renamed as the Cong. Andres Acop Cosalan Road.

SEC. 2. The Department of public Works and Highways shall place appropriate markers along the Cong. Andres Acop Cosalan Road and issue the necessary orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect immediately upon approval.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

PANTALEON D. ALVAREZ

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 16, 2017 and March 12, 2018,respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

CESAR STRAIT PAREJA

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: AUG 17 2018

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Senate
